pipeline: User request is converted by Scene Director into camera_intent.
camera_intent is normalized into camera_plan JSON.
camera_plan selects shot_size, lens_profile, angle, framing, depth_dof, crop policy, and subject slots.
workflow compiler patches width/height, prompts, control maps, reference slots, and pass routing where supported.
QA validates framing evidence before promotion.
blocked_conditions: full_body shot with square resolution and no crop/margin adjustment
video camera motion requested without video runtime lane proof
pose/depth/openpose requested before local object_info and runtime proof exist
